ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant (M/F) */,
  "female" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant is female (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Session number for tracking purposes */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time in minutes for the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., cognitive behavioral therapy, mindfulness) */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "psychological_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each psychological assessment */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session in which the assessment was conducted */,
  "cesd_score" INTEGER /* CES-D score for depression assessment */,
  "ds_s" INTEGER /* DS-S score (another psychological measure) */,
  "phq_score" INTEGER /* PHQ score for generalized anxiety disorder */,
  "gad_score" INTEGER /* GAD score for generalized anxiety disorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_psychological_assessments_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_tracking" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "age_w1" INTEGER /* Age at the first session */,
  "age_change" INTEGER /* Change in age across sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_tracking_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead researcher, data analyst) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Research specialization (e.g., psychology, statistics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Specific data accessed (e.g., psychological assessment, demographic survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "average_cesd" REAL /* Average CES-D score across sessions */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions completed by the participant */,
  "average_phq" REAL /* Average PHQ score across sessions */,
  "average_gad" REAL /* Average GAD score across sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_summary_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the survey completion */,
  "response_data" TEXT /* Serialized response data (e.g., JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_surveys_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new data, session summary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., session, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant in the group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the study group */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant joined the group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of study group (e.g., cognitive behavioral therapy, mindfulness) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_groups_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_participants" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_participants_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date of the export */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* Type of export (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
